chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3718 of 2017 CP D 2855 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 16777/2017 2. For hearing of main case 03.03.2025 Mr. Umer Akhund advocate for the petitioner Ms. Zakia advocate holds brief for Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, these petitions assail show cause notices. Learned counsel states that the petitioners shall contest the show cause notices before the issuing authority, however, seeks that the same be decided vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners. Learned counsel further states that it may be just and proper for the respondents not to take any coercive action against the petitioners. Learned counsel for respondent articulate no cavil in such regard and states that these petitions be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
